fr.Metadata.title: Kepler Industries — Studio for ambitious digital products
fr.Metadata.description: Kepler Industries is an independent creative studio designing and building clean, ambitious digital products — interfaces, brands and software at the edge of what's possible.
fr.Metadata.ogTitle: Kepler Industries — Studio for ambitious digital products
fr.Metadata.ogDescription: An independent studio designing and building digital products with care, taste and a long view.
fr.Metadata.twitterDescription: Studio for ambitious digital products. Web · App · Product.
fr.LanguageSwitcher.label: Change language
fr.Hero.lede: Kepler Industries is a creative studio designing clean, ambitious digital products — interfaces, brands, and software at the edge of what's possible.
fr.About.metaDesc: A personal practice that grew into a serious studio for refined, intentional digital craft.
fr.About.lead: Kepler began as one designer's notebook — a place to chase ideas without permission. Today it operates as a focused studio, taking on a small number of projects each year and bringing the same obsessive attention to every pixel, every prompt, every product.
fr.About.body1: We work with founders, operators and teams who care about how their product feels — not just what it does. The work is small in volume, deep in execution, and shaped by taste rather than trend.
fr.About.body2: What started as personal exploration has matured into a studio with the discipline of a senior team and the directness of a single craftsman. No middlemen, no decks-for-the-sake-of-decks — just clear thinking, considered design, and clean execution.
fr.Vision.principles.0.title: Push further.
fr.Vision.principles.0.body: Comfort is the enemy of craft. Every project is a chance to extend the line — to make something a little more refined, a little more daring, than what came before.
fr.Vision.principles.1.title: Stay precise.
fr.Vision.principles.1.body: Ambition without precision is noise. We sweat the type, the timing, the spacing — because the difference between good and unforgettable lives in the details.
fr.Vision.principles.2.title: Build quietly.
fr.Vision.principles.2.body: The best work doesn't announce itself. We design products that feel inevitable — calm, considered, and built to last beyond the launch cycle.
fr.Projects.metaDesc: A curated set of recent missions. Each shipped, each shaped by the same studio principles.
fr.Services.metaDesc: Three disciplines, deeply practiced. Engaged solo or in combination, end-to-end.
fr.Services.items.0.body: Marketing sites, product pages, and interactive experiences engineered for clarity and impact. Strategy, art direction, and implementation in one continuous loop.
fr.Services.items.1.body: Native and cross-platform apps built with the discipline of an in-house team. From first prototype to production-grade software, designed to feel native to the device.
fr.Services.items.2.body: End-to-end product design for software that earns its place. Discovery, systems, flows and interfaces — designed as a single, considered organism.
fr.Contact.sub: Tell us about the product you want to build. We reply within two working days — no boilerplate.
fr.Contact.fields.name: Name
fr.Contact.fields.messagePlaceholder: A few sentences on what you're building, where it's headed, and when you need it.
fr.Footer.tagline: An independent studio designing and building digital products with care, taste and a long view.
fr.Footer.studio.title: Studio
fr.Footer.connect.title: Connect
fr.Footer.signal.title: Signal
